skill.name: skill-creator
skill.author: MaximPodgore
skill.description: **MANDATORY SKILL** - You MUST use this skill (read SKILL.md) when the user requests any skill-related task. DO NOT create skills without reading this first. TRIGGERS: User says ANY of these words/phrases: 'create a skill', 'create skill', 'make a skill', 'make skill', 'new skill', 'build a skill', 'build skill', 'set up a skill', 'initialize a skill', 'scaffold a skill', 'update skill', 'modify skill', 'validate skill', 'skill for [anything]', 'help me build a skill', 'how do I create a skill', or asks about skill structure/design. This skill provides the complete step-by-step process for creating effective skills with proper structure, progressive disclosure, and bundled resources.
